nasb.text: When the herdsmen saw what had happened, they ran away and reported it in the city and out in the country.

esv.text: When the herdsmen saw what had happened, they fled and told it in the city and in the country.

cnv.text: 放豬的看見所發生的事就逃跑，到城裡和各鄉村把這事傳開。

ccb.text: 放猪的人见此情形拔腿就跑，把这事告诉了城里和乡下的人。

csbs.text: 那些放猪的人看见所发生的事，就逃跑了，去把这事传到城里城外。
